title: taraxacum icterinum
intro: Taraxacum icterinum, also known as Yellow Sow Thistle, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and act as a diuretic. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum icterinum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
